subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to Truth! Thy letter dated 31 July 1920 was received, and from its contents [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب حقیقت نامه بتاریخ 31 جولای 1920 رسید و از مضامینش
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @the economic problem and its solution; voluntary giving, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @universal peace; world unity
